name: Swallowed Penny
description: Spawns a coin when Isaac takes damage.

name: Petrified Poop
description: Greatly increases the chance of finding drops when destroying poop.

name: AAA Battery
description: Removes one charge needed for the active item to be fully charged.

name: Broken Remote
description: Using an active item teleports Isaac to a random room.

name: Purple Heart
description: Increases the chance of champion enemies spawning.

name: Broken Magnet
description: Pulls coins towards Isaac from a distance.

name: Rosary Bead
description: Increases the chance of finding Angel Rooms.

name: Cartridge
description: When Isaac takes damage, there is a chance to trigger The Gamekid effect.

name: Pulse Worm
description: Tears pulsate in size as they travel.

name: Wiggle Worm
description: Tears move in a wavy pattern and grants spectral tears.

name: Ring Worm
description: Tears move in a spiraling pattern.

name: Flat Worm
description: Tears are flattened and have increased knockback.

name: Store Credit
description: Makes the next shop item free. Consumed on use.

name: Callus
description: Isaac is immune to creep and spikes.

name: Lucky Rock
description: Destroying rocks has a high chance of dropping coins.

name: Mom's Toenail
description: Mom's foot stomps a random enemy every 60 seconds.

name: Black Lipstick
description: Increases the chance of Black Hearts spawning.

name: Bible Tract
description: Increases the chance of Eternal Hearts spawning.

name: Paper Clip
description: Golden chests can be opened without keys.

name: Monkey Paw
description: Grants a Black Heart when Isaac is at half a heart. Consumed after three uses.

name: Mysterious Paper
description: Randomly grants the effects of The Polaroid, The Negative, Missing Poster, or A Torn Photo each room.

name: Daemon's Tail
description: Most non-boss-room pickups become Black Hearts, but other heart drops become very rare.

name: Missing Poster
description: Dying in a Sacrifice Room as a non-Lost character unlocks The Lost. Respawns Isaac as The Lost.

name: Butt Penny
description: Spawns a gas cloud when picking up coins.

name: Mysterious Candy
description: Isaac randomly farts or spawns poop.

name: Hook Worm
description: Tears move in angular patterns and deal increased damage.

name: Whip Worm
description: Increases tear shot speed.

name: Broken Ankh
description: Isaac has a chance to respawn as ??? (Blue Baby) upon death.

name: Fish Head
description: Spawns attack flies when Isaac takes damage.

name: Pinky Eye
description: Gives a chance to fire poison tears.

name: Push Pin
description: Gives a chance to fire spectral and piercing tears.

name: Liberty Cap
description: Randomly grants a mushroom item effect each room.

name: Umbilical Cord
description: When at half a red heart or less, a Baby familiar spawns for the current room.

name: Child's Heart
description: Increases the chance of heart drops after clearing a room.

name: Curved Horn
description: Increases damage by 2.

name: Rusted Key
description: Increases the chance of finding keys and opening locked doors.

name: Goat Hoof
description: Increases speed by 0.15.

name: Mom's Pearl
description: Increases the chance of finding Soul Hearts.

name: NO!
description: Prevents active items from spawning.

name: Child Leash
description: Familiars stay closer to Isaac.

name: Brown Cap
description: Poop explodes when destroyed.

name: Meconium
description: Spawned poop may be Black Poop, which deals damage to nearby enemies.

name: Cracked Crown
description: Multiplies the bonus from the highest stat up by 0.2 for other stats.

name: Used Diaper
description: All enemies are friendly until Isaac fires a tear.

name: Fish Tail
description: Doubles the chance of items and pickups being doubled.

name: Black Feather
description: Increases damage by 0.5 for each evil item held.

name: Blind Rage
description: Increases invincibility frames after taking damage.

name: Golden Horse Shoe
description: Treasure Rooms have a chance to have two items to choose from.

name: Store Key
description: Shops can be opened without keys.

name: Rib of Greed
description: Prevents Greed and Super Greed from appearing in shops.

name: Karma
description: Donating to donation machines has a chance to heal Isaac or grant other rewards.

name: Lil Larva
description: Spawns a Blue Fly when poop is destroyed.

name: Mom's Locket
description: Grants half a red heart when a key is used.

name: NO. 2
description: While firing tears, Isaac has a chance to drop a lit Butt Bomb.

name: Louse
description: Spawns a Blue Spider when Isaac takes damage.

name: Bob's Bladder
description: Tears leave a creep trail as they travel.

name: Watch Battery
description: Gives a chance to add an extra charge to the active item when clearing a room.

name: Blasting Cap
description: Bombs have a chance to drop a pickup when they explode.

name: Stud Finder
description: Increases the chance of finding crawl spaces when using bombs.

name: Error
description: Grants a random trinket effect each room.

name: Poker Chip
description: Chests have a 50/50 chance to contain extra pickups or nothing.

name: Blister
description: Increases knockback of tears.

name: Second Hand
description: Increases the duration of status effects on enemies.

name: Endless Nameless
description: Using a pill, card, or rune has a chance to spawn a copy.

name: Black Tooth
description: Gives a chance to fire a poison tooth that deals double damage.

name: Ouroboros Worm
description: Tears have a chance to home in on enemies and gain piercing.

name: Tonsil
description: After taking enough damage, spawns a familiar that blocks enemy shots.

name: Nose Goblin
description: Gives a chance to fire a homing sticky tear that deals damage over time.

name: Super Ball
description: Tears have a chance to bounce off enemies and obstacles.

name: Vibrant Bulb
description: While the active item is fully charged, grants stat bonuses.

name: Dim Bulb
description: While the active item is completely uncharged, grants significant stat bonuses.

name: Fragmented Card
description: Activates both The Polaroid and The Negative effects on taking damage at half a heart.

name: Equality!
description: When coins, bombs, and keys are equal in count, pickups cycle between types.

name: Wish Bone
description: Has a chance to be destroyed and spawn a pedestal item when Isaac takes damage.

name: Bag Lunch
description: Has a chance to be destroyed and spawn Lunch when Isaac takes damage.

name: Lost Cork
description: Increases the radius of creep effects.

name: Crow Heart
description: Red hearts are damaged before Soul or Black Hearts.

name: Walnut
description: After being hit by enough explosions, drops a random pickup and is consumed.

name: Duct Tape
description: Familiars stop moving and are fixed in place relative to Isaac.

name: Silver Dollar
description: Shops appear in the Womb and beyond.

name: Bloody Crown
description: Treasure Rooms appear in the Womb and beyond.

name: Pay To Win
description: Restock machines appear after every Treasure Room item.

name: Locust of Wrath
description: Spawns a red attack fly on room entry that explodes on hit.

name: Locust of Pestilence
description: Spawns a green attack fly on room entry that poisons enemies.

name: Locust of Famine
description: Spawns a yellow attack fly on room entry that slows enemies.

name: Locust of Death
description: Spawns a black attack fly on room entry that deals high damage.

name: Locust of Conquest
description: Spawns a white attack fly on room entry that splits into more flies.

name: Bat Wing
description: Killing an enemy has a chance to grant flight for the current room.

name: Stem Cell
description: Heals half a red heart when entering a new floor.

name: Hairpin
description: Fully charges the active item when entering a boss room.

name: Wooden Cross
description: Grants a shield that blocks one hit per floor.

name: Butter!
description: Using an active item has a chance to drop it on the floor.

name: Filigree Feather
description: Angel statues drop items instead of key pieces when destroyed.

name: Door Stop
description: The last door Isaac walked through stays open.

name: Extension Cord
description: Beams of electricity arc between familiars and Isaac, damaging enemies.

name: Rotten Penny
description: Spawns a Blue Fly when picking up coins.

name: Baby-Bender
description: Familiar tears gain homing.

name: Finger Bone
description: Taking damage has a chance to grant a Bone Heart.

name: Jawbreaker
description: Gives a chance to fire teeth tears that deal 3.2x damage.

name: Chewed Pen
description: Gives a chance to fire tears that slow enemies.

name: Blessed Penny
description: Spawns a half Soul Heart when picking up coins.

name: Broken Syringe
description: Grants a random syringe item effect each room.

name: Short Fuse
description: Bombs explode faster.

name: Gigante Bean
description: Increases the size of thrown bombs.

name: A Lighter
description: Entering a room with enemies has a chance to set them on fire.

name: Broken Padlock
description: Locked doors, chests, and key blocks can be opened with bombs instead of keys.

name: Myosotis
description: Pickups left in the previous floor's starting room appear in the next floor's starting room.

name: 'M
description: Rerolls the active item on pickup.

name: Teardrop Charm
description: Gives a chance to apply a random status effect with tears.

name: Apple of Sodom
description: Red hearts have a chance to be converted into Blue Spiders when collected.

name: Forgotten Lullaby
description: Increases the fire rate of familiars.

name: Beth's Faith
description: Spawns wisps at the start of each floor.

name: Old Capacitor
description: Stops natural active item charging, but room clears have a chance to drop Lil Batteries.

name: Brain Worm
description: Tears snap 90 degrees to target enemies they pass close to.

name: Perfection
description: Grants +10 luck while held. Destroyed when Isaac takes damage.

name: Devil's Crown
description: Treasure Rooms contain Devil Deal items that cost Red Heart containers.

name: Charged Penny
description: Picking up coins has a chance to add a charge to the active item.

name: Friendship Necklace
description: Familiars orbit around Isaac.

name: Panic Button
description: Activates the active item when Isaac takes damage.

name: Blue Key
description: Opening a locked door instead creates a portal to a Hush-style room.

name: Flat File
description: Retracts all floor spikes permanently.

name: Telescope Lens
description: Increases the chance of Planetarium rooms appearing.

name: Mom's Lock
description: Grants a random Mom item effect each room.

name: Dice Bag
description: Has a chance to spawn a random die item at the start of each room.

name: Holy Crown
description: Treasure Rooms and Shops appear in the Cathedral.

name: Mother's Kiss
description: Grants one additional heart container.

name: Torn Card
description: Every 15 shots, fires an Ipecac + My Reflection tear.

name: Torn Pocket
description: Taking damage drops two random pickups from Isaac's consumables.

name: Gilded Key
description: All chests become golden chests. A golden chest spawns at the start of each floor.

name: Lucky Sack
description: Spawns a random pickup after clearing a boss room.

name: Wicked Crown
description: Treasure Rooms and Shops appear in Sheol.

name: Azazel's Stump
description: Clearing a room has a chance to transform Isaac into Azazel for the next room.

name: Dingle Berry
description: Spawns friendly Dip familiars when clearing a room.

name: Ring Cap
description: Bombs spawn an extra bomb pickup when they explode.

name: Nuh Uh!
description: Replaces coin, key, and bomb pickups in the Womb and beyond with other pickups.

name: Modeling Clay
description: Grants the effect of a random passive item each room.

name: Polished Bone
description: Clearing a room has a chance to spawn a friendly Bony.

name: Hollow Heart
description: Grants an empty Bone Heart container at the start of each floor.

name: Kid's Drawing
description: Counts as a Guppy item towards the Guppy transformation.

name: Crystal Key
description: Clearing a room has a chance to open a red room on the current floor.

name: Keeper's Bargain
description: Devil Deal items have a chance to cost coins instead of hearts.

name: Cursed Penny
description: Picking up coins teleports Isaac to a random room.

name: Your Soul
description: Makes the next Devil Deal free. Consumed on use.

name: Number Magnet
description: Increases the chance of Devil Rooms appearing and prevents Krampus.

name: Broken Glasses
description: Gives a chance to reveal the blind item in alternate Treasure Rooms.

name: Ice Cube
description: Entering a room has a chance to petrify all enemies briefly.

name: Sigil of Baphomet
description: Grants a brief shield after killing an enemy.

name: Voodoo Pin
description: Gives a chance for enemy Red Hearts to deal damage to all enemies in the room.

name: Bloody Gust
description: Taking damage grants speed and tears up for the current floor, stacking up to a cap.

name: Eye Drops
description: One eye fires tears faster, creating an offset firing pattern.

name: Act of Contrition
description: Grants an Eternal Heart and allows Angel Room access even after taking Devil Deals.

name: Member Card
description: Spawns a trapdoor in shops leading to a secondary underground shop.

name: Battery Pack
description: Spawns a Lil Battery at the start of each floor.

name: Mom's Perfume
description: Gives a chance to fire fear tears. Grants +1 damage.

name: Worm Friend
description: A friendly Nerve Ending bursts from the ground to latch onto and damage enemies.

name: Bone Spurs
description: Enemies have a chance to spawn bone shards on death that block shots.

name: Hungrier Soul
description: Killing enemies has a chance to spawn a ghost that seeks out and damages other enemies.

name: Astral Projection
description: Getting hit in an uncleared room grants a brief spirit form with spectral tears and flight.

name: Crystal Ball (Trinket)
description: Reveals the full map on floor entry. Drops a Soul Heart or card.

name: Sacred Orb
description: Prevents low-quality items from spawning.

name: RC Remote
description: Isaac's movement controls are reversed.

name: Found Soul
description: A ghostly familiar follows Isaac and mimics his tears. Destroyed on hit, respawns next floor.

name: Expansion Pack
description: Using an active item also triggers a random active item effect.

name: Beth's Essence
description: Spawns wisps when picking up items from Angel Rooms.

name: The Twins
description: Clearing a room has a chance to duplicate a familiar for the room.

name: Adoption Papers
description: Shops can sell familiars.

name: Cricket Leg
description: Killing enemies has a chance to spawn a random locust fly.

name: Apollo's Best Friend
description: A familiar sits in place and shoots at nearby enemies.

name: Broken Glasses
description: Gives a chance to see the extra blind Treasure Room item.

name: Ice Cube
description: Entering a room has a chance to petrify enemies for a few seconds.

name: Sigil of Baphomet
description: Killing an enemy grants a brief damage shield.
